mapper.select: SELECT p.*, c.name AS category_name FROM favorites f JOIN products p ON p.id = f.product_id JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO favorites (user_id, product_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
